name: Coneccion Calipso
query:
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY parte ASC, codigoproceso ASC;

name: Gas 3 Periodos Total SQL (188Dias)
func:
let gasConsumo = `
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Gas 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    [gasnor] AS 'GasDiario',
    '2024' AS 'anio'
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 155

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Gas 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    [gasnor] AS 'GasDiario',
    '2023' AS 'anio'
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 190

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Gas 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    [gasnor] AS 'GasDiario',
    '2022' AS 'anio'
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 150
ORDER BY 
    anio ASC, parte ASC;
`;

msg.payload = gasConsumo;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Color Azucar 3 Periodos Total SQL (188Dias)
func:
let colorAzucar = `
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Color Azucar 2024' AS codigoproceso, 
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS 'color'
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Color Azucar 2023' AS codigoproceso, 
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS 'color'
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Color Azucar 2022' AS codigoproceso, 
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS 'color'
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial

ORDER BY 
    parte ASC;


`;

msg.payload = colorAzucar;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Zafras 3 Periodos Total SQL (188Dias)
func:
let moliendaTotal = `
-- Crear tabla temporal común para almacenar los resultados intermedios de varios años
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TempMolienda') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #TempMolienda;

CREATE TABLE #TempMolienda (
    parte INT,
    codigoproceso VARCHAR(20),
    diario DECIMAL(18, 2),
    fechaindustrial DATE,
    anio INT
);

-- Insertar los datos del año 2024
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2024 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 150;  -- Limitar días para 2024

-- Insertar los datos del año 2023
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2023 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 186;  -- Limitar días para 2023

-- Insertar los datos del año 2022
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2022 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 147;  -- Limitar días para 2022

-- Seleccionar los datos con el acumulado separado por año
SELECT 
    parte,
    codigoproceso,
    diario,
    (SELECT SUM(t2.diario) 
     FROM #TempMolienda t2
     WHERE t2.fechaindustrial <= t1.fechaindustrial
     AND t2.anio = t1.anio  -- Acumulado solo para el mismo año
    ) AS acumulado,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t1.fechaindustrial, 101) AS fechaindustrial,
    t1.anio
FROM 
    #TempMolienda t1
ORDER BY parte ASC, codigoproceso ASC;

-- Eliminar la tabla temporal
DROP TABLE #TempMolienda;
`;

msg.payload = moliendaTotal;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Gas 3 Periodos Total SQL (188Dias)
func:
let gasConsumo = `
-- Crear tabla temporal para almacenar los resultados intermedios
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TempGas') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #TempGas;

CREATE TABLE #TempGas (
    parte INT,
    codigoproceso VARCHAR(20),
    GasDiario DECIMAL(18, 2),
    fechaindustrial DATE,
    anio INT
);

-- Insertar los datos del año 2024
INSERT INTO #TempGas (parte, codigoproceso, GasDiario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Gas 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    gasnor AS GasDiario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2024 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 155;

-- Insertar los datos del año 2023
INSERT INTO #TempGas (parte, codigoproceso, GasDiario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Gas 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    gasnor AS GasDiario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2023 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 190;

-- Insertar los datos del año 2022
INSERT INTO #TempGas (parte, codigoproceso, GasDiario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Gas 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    gasnor AS GasDiario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2022 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 150;

-- Seleccionar los datos con el acumulado discriminado por año
SELECT 
    parte,
    codigoproceso,
    GasDiario,
    (SELECT SUM(t2.GasDiario)
     FROM #TempGas t2
     WHERE t2.fechaindustrial <= t1.fechaindustrial
     AND t2.anio = t1.anio -- Acumulado solo para el mismo año
    ) AS acumulado,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t1.fechaindustrial, 101) AS fechaindustrial,
    t1.anio
FROM 
    #TempGas t1
ORDER BY 
    t1.anio ASC, parte ASC;

-- Eliminar la tabla temporal
DROP TABLE #TempGas;

`;

msg.payload = gasConsumo;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Color Azucar 3 Periodos Total SQL (188Dias)
func:
let colorAzucar = `
-- Crear tabla temporal para almacenar los resultados intermedios
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TempColor') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #TempColor;

CREATE TABLE #TempColor (
    parte INT,
    codigoproceso VARCHAR(50),
    color DECIMAL(18, 2),
    fechaindustrial DATE,
    anio INT
);

-- Insertar los datos del año 2024
INSERT INTO #TempColor (parte, codigoproceso, color, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Color Azucar 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS color,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2024 AS anio
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial;

-- Insertar los datos del año 2023
INSERT INTO #TempColor (parte, codigoproceso, color, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Color Azucar 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS color,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2023 AS anio
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial;

-- Insertar los datos del año 2022
INSERT INTO #TempColor (parte, codigoproceso, color, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Color Azucar 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS color,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2022 AS anio
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial;

-- Seleccionar los datos con el acumulado discriminado por año
SELECT 
    parte,
    codigoproceso,
    color,
    (SELECT SUM(t2.color)
     FROM #TempColor t2
     WHERE t2.fechaindustrial <= t1.fechaindustrial
     AND t2.anio = t1.anio  -- Acumulado solo para el mismo año
    ) AS acumulado,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t1.fechaindustrial, 101) AS fechaindustrial,
    t1.anio
FROM 
    #TempColor t1
ORDER BY 
    t1.anio ASC, parte ASC;

-- Eliminar la tabla temporal
DROP TABLE #TempColor;
`;

msg.payload = colorAzucar;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Pol Cachaza SQL
func:
let colorAzucar = `
-- Consulta original para los datos reales
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte','Pol Bagazo' AS codigoproceso,[polb] AS 'pol'
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 150

UNION ALL

-- Fila adicional para el objetivo
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS 'parte',
    'Objetivo' AS codigoproceso,  -- Codigoproceso con el valor "Objetivo"
    3 AS 'pol'  -- Valor del objetivo en la columna pol
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 150

ORDER BY 
    codigoproceso ASC, parte ASC;
`;

msg.payload = colorAzucar;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Analisis Azucar (Laboratorio)
func:
let analisisAzucar = `
select 
id,
codigoproceso,
fecharegistro,
HORA,Color,
Turbidez,
Humedad,
Cenizas,
Granulometria_20,
Granulometria_30,
Sediment_Test,
Destino from pr_ezi_especiales where id= (select max(id)
from pr_ezi_especiales where codigoproceso='Cinta Corta' AND Color IS NOT NULL)
UNION select id,
codigoproceso,
fecharegistro,
HORA,
Color,
Turbidez,
Humedad,
Cenizas,
Granulometria_20,
Granulometria_30,
Sediment_Test,
Destino from pr_ezi_especiales where id= (select max(id) from pr_ezi_especiales 
where codigoproceso='Cinta Larga' AND Color IS NOT NULL)
UNION select id,
codigoproceso,
fecharegistro,
HORA,
Color,
Turbidez,
Humedad,
Cenizas,
Granulometria_20,
Granulometria_30,
Sediment_Test,
Destino from pr_ezi_especiales where id= (select max(id) from pr_ezi_especiales 
where codigoproceso='Embolsado' AND Color IS NOT NULL)  ORDER BY codigoproceso;
`;

msg.payload = analisisAzucar;

horaregistro,

query:
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY parte ASC, codigoproceso ASC;

name: Sulfitado (Laboratorio)
func:
let sulfitado = `
select id,
codigoproceso,
fechaindustrial,
fecharegistro,
horaregistro,
HORA,
phmanual,
PPMS02manual,
brixautomatico,
polautomatico,
fibra from pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
where id= (select max(id) from pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
where codigoproceso='Sulfitado' AND phmanual IS NOT NULL);`
;

msg.payload = sulfitado;

return msg;

name: Coneccion Calipso
query:
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103), 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY parte ASC, codigoproceso ASC;
